invariant: get_entity_context returns an explicit empty result when the subject exists but has zero claims.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = get_entity_context returns an empty claims list for account-meta-1-example without fabricating context.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Defines entity and claim tables, inserts the synthetic subject, and intentionally inserts zero claims.
fixture_design_notes.inputs: Standard account get_entity_context request for the synthetic subject.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Empty result with an explicit zero_claims_for_subject reason.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: No sources or field attribution because no claim-backed data exists.
